report.title: Gabatar da Rahoto
report.anonymous_secure: Ba Tare da Sunan kuma Amintacce
report.anonymous_notice: Rahoton ku gaba daya ba shi da sunan sai dai in kun zabi ku bayar da bayanin tuntuɓar ku.
report.tell_what_happened: Gayar mana abin da ya faru *
report.description_placeholder: Gayar mana abin da ya faru da kalmomin ku. Za ku iya rubutu yawa ko kadan yadda kuke so...
report.description_help: Gayar mana abin da ya faru, lokacin da ya faru, da inda ya faru. Yi amfani da sauƙin kalmomi.
report.file_types: Har zuwa 10MB ga kowane fayil. Ana karɓa: JPG, PNG, PDF, MP4
report.category_help: Wannan yana taimaka mana mu haɗa ku da mutanen da suka dace, amma za ku iya tsallake wannan.
report.contact_info: Haɗa bayanin tuntuɓar don bi da baya
report.contact_optional: Zaɓi: Bayar da bayanin tuntuɓar ku in kuna son mu bi da rahoton ku
report.accuracy_notice: Ta wurin gabatar da wannan rahoto, kun yarda cewa bayanan da aka bayar sahihi ne gwargwadon ilimin ku.

confirmation.report_sent: An aika rahoton ku cikin aminci
confirmation.review_notice: Za mu duba rahoton ku cikin sa'o'i 24. Kun yi jaruntaka ta wurin yin magana.
confirmation.what_next: Me kuke son ku yi na gaba?
confirmation.report_something_else: Bayar da rahoto akan wani abu

confirmation.help_description: Duba wuraren da za su iya taimaka muku
